zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Cromwell於1392年出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell54歲，母親Maud de Bernanke55歲。她和John Culpeper至少有1個女兒。她去世於1450年在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾可頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Cromwell于1392年出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell54岁，母亲Maud de Bernanke55岁。她和John Culpeper至少有1个女儿。她去世于1450年在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾可頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Cromwell was born in 1392, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, was 54 and her mother, Maud de Bernanke, was 55. She had at least 1 daughter with John Culpeper. She died in 1450, in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Cromwell est née en 1392, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Maud de Bernanke, avait 55 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Culpeper. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Cromwell 1392 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 54 und ihre Mutter Maud de Bernanke 55. Sie hatte mit John Culpeper mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Exton, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Cromwell è nata il nel 1392 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Maud de Bernanke, aveva 55 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Culpeper. Morì nel 1450, nel Exton, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Cromwellが1392年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellは54歳，母Maud de Bernankeは55歳であった。彼女はJohn Culpeperとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1450年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエクストンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Cromwell(이)가 1392년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Bernanke(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 John Culpeper(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 스턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Cromwell nasceu em 1392, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Bernanke, tinha 55 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com John Culpeper. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Cromwell родилась в 1392 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Bernanke, 55. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Culpeper. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana Cromwell nació en 1392, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Maud de Bernanke, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con John Culpeper. Murió en 1450, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
